name: Gou Hadoken
description: (Hold the button to change effect)Fire a ki blast directly forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range.

name: Zanku Hadoken
description: (During a forward jump)Fire a ki blast from the air to the ground below. This attack is effective as a tool to shield your approach. The Overdrive version can also be performed from a neutral jump.

name: Gou Shoryuken
description: Leap into the air and perform a powerful uppercut. A Gou Shoryuken is invincible to an opponent's jumping attacks, making it a great anti-air tool.

name: Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku
description: Unleash a series of roundhouse kicks while moving forward. Useful in combos as well as for sending opponents flying away.

name: Aerial Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku
description: A Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku performed during a jump. Useful to change jump trajectory or to finish up combos.

name: Adamant Flame
description: A quick thrust engulfed in flames. Useful for exploiting an opponent's opening, or in combos.

name: Demon Raid
description: A quick leap towards the opponent that allows you to transition into various techniques. Clever use of these techniques will help strengthen your offense.

name: Demon Low Slash
description: (During Demon Raid)Performs a low sweep the moment Demon Raid lands back on the ground. The kick has a long reach, and allows you to act before an opponent even if blocked.

name: Demon Guillotine
description: A vicious downward chop performed from Demon Raid. This is an overhead attack, and allows you to act before an opponent even if blocked.

name: Demon Blade Kick
description: (During Demon Raid)A quick downward kick performed from Demon Raid. The button used determines your angle of descent.

name: Demon Swoop
description: (During Demon Raid)A sudden drop to the ground performed from Demon Raid that eliminates any openings. Mix this in with other Demon Raid finishers to keep your opponent guessing.

name: Demon Gou Zanku
description: (During Overdrive Demon Raid)An attack only available from Overdrive Demon Raid. Useful in combos or for a surprise attack, it doesn't consume any additional Drive.

name: Demon Gou Rasen
description: (During Overdrive Demon Raid)An attack only available from Overdrive Demon Raid. Useful in combos against an airborne opponent, it doesn't consume any additional Drive.

name: Ashura Senku
description: A technique that grants the user swift movement while cloaking them in illusions. Input forward or back together with the other buttons to move in that direction.

name: Oboro Throw
description: A throw available during Ashura Senku. Useful at mid-range against opponents with a tendency to block.

name: Messatsu Gohado
description: Fires a high-speed, concentrated ball of the Satsui no Hado forward. Has high attack power for a projectile-based Super Art.

name: Tenma Gozanku
description: (During a neutral or forward jump)Fire a powerful ki blast from the air to the ground below. Useful for finishing combos from jump attacks that can be canceled.

name: Empyrean's End
description: Turns the Satsui no Hado into a powerful flame before piercing the opponent. Opponents are open to follow-up attacks if they reach the end of the stage after being launched.

name: Sip of Calamity
description: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)Knocks down an opponent with overwhelming strength before unleashing a single, devastating blow. It can be canceled into from a special move, making it particularly useful in combos.

name: Shun Goku Satsu
description: (Can be performed when vitality is at 25% or below)A secret technique that overwhelms an opponent with myriad of attacks made in a single second. Cannot be avoided if performed at close range while the opponent is standing on the ground.

name: Skull Splitter
description: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.

name: Resso Snap Kick
description: A quick, long-reaching snap kick.

name: Rago High Kick
description: A launching kick that can be canceled into special moves.

name: Viscera Piercer
description: A quick series of attacks that can be canceled by a special move to create combos, or eliminate gaps that would leave you open to counterattack.

name: Bone Crusher Axe Kick
description: A two-hit series of attacks, the second of which cannot be blocked crouching.

name: Kikoku Combination
description: A multi-hit attack with a lenient input window for follow-ups.

name: Tenmaku Blade Kick
description: (During a forward jump)A downward attack that doesn't leave you open, and allows you to change the trajectory of your forward jump.

name: Goshoha
description: (When near opponent)Grab your opponent, and send them flying away with two consecutive palm strikes. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Shuretto
description: (When near opponent)Grab your opponent, and deliver a devastating downward chop. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Oni Goroshi
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Souha Double Palm
description: (When blocking, recovering from a knockdown, or during a successful Drive Parry)Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising.

name: Drive Parry
description: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: (During a Drive Parry)Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)Immediately move forward out of an attack. Can be performed during any special-cancelable move.
